name: epoch-data-on-ai-models
title: Epoch Data on AI Models
description: Comprehensive database of over 2800 AI/ML models tracking key factors driving machine learning progress, including parameters, training compute, training dataset size, publication date, organization, and more. Sourced from Epoch AI.

resources.name: all-ai-models
resources.title: All AI Models
resources.description: All AI models in the Epoch database (~21,000 entries).

fields.name: Model
fields.description: Name of the AI model

fields.name: Domain
fields.description: Domain(s) the model operates in (e.g. Language, Vision)

fields.name: Task
fields.description: Task(s) the model is designed for

fields.name: Organization
fields.description: Organization(s) that developed the model

fields.name: Authors
fields.description: Authors of the model or associated paper

fields.name: Publication date
fields.description: Date the model was published or released

fields.name: Reference
fields.description: Citation reference for the model

fields.name: Link
fields.description: URL to model paper or announcement

fields.name: Citations
fields.description: Number of citations

fields.name: Notability criteria
fields.description: Criteria that make this model notable

fields.name: Notability criteria notes
fields.description: Additional notes on notability criteria

fields.name: Parameters
fields.description: Number of model parameters

fields.name: Parameters notes
fields.description: Notes on parameter count

fields.name: Training compute (FLOP)
fields.description: Total training compute in floating point operations

fields.description: Notes on training compute estimate

fields.description: Name or description of the training dataset

fields.description: Notes on the training dataset

fields.description: Number of datapoints in the training dataset

fields.description: Hardware used for training (e.g. A100, H100)

fields.description: Modeling approach or architecture type

fields.description: Confidence level of the data entries

fields.name: Abstract

fields.description: Benchmark evaluation data

fields.description: Accessibility of the model weights (e.g. open, closed)

fields.name: Country (of organization)
fields.description: Country where the developing organization is based

fields.description: Base model this model was fine-tuned from, if any
